layers.name: background_gradient
layers.description: A subtle light purple to white radial gradient background, providing a clean and modern backdrop for the UI.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A subtle light purple to white radial gradient background.

layers.name: phone_device_frame
layers.description: A white, rounded rectangular frame with a subtle shadow, representing a smartphone device holding the UI content.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A white, rounded rectangular smartphone device frame with a subtle shadow, isolated on a transparent background.

layers.name: status_bar
layers.description: The top status bar of the phone UI, displaying '9:41 AM', cellular signal, and battery icons.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A smartphone status bar displaying '9:41 AM' on the left, and cellular signal, Wi-Fi, and battery icons on the right, in a clean, modern UI style.

layers.name: app_header_and_search
layers.description: The app header featuring 'Wanderlust' title, a search bar with 'Where to next?', and a profile icon on the right.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A clean app header with 'Wanderlust' as the main title, a search bar below it with 'Where to next?' placeholder text and a location icon, and a profile icon on the top right.

layers.name: hero_banner
layers.description: A prominent hero banner featuring a tropical beach scene with a palm tree, overlaid with 'Discover Your Paradise. Book now for exclusive deals.' text.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A hero banner for a travel app, featuring a vibrant tropical beach scene with a palm tree and turquoise water. Overlay the text 'Discover Your Paradise.' in large white font and 'Book now for exclusive deals.' in smaller white font.

layers.name: category_filters
layers.description: A horizontal scrollable row of category filter buttons, including 'Beaches', 'Mountains', 'Cities', 'Adventure', 'Culture', and 'Cruises', each with an icon.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A horizontal scrollable row of rounded category filter buttons for a travel app. Buttons include 'Beaches', 'Mountains', 'Cities', 'Adventure', 'Culture', and 'Cruises', each with a relevant small icon and light grey border.

layers.name: featured_destinations_section
layers.description: The 'Featured Destinations' section title followed by a grid of four destination cards: Bali, Kyoto, Santorini, and Maldives, each with an image, name, rating, and price.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A UI section titled 'Featured Destinations'. Below the title, display a 2x2 grid of travel destination cards. Each card should include a scenic image, destination name (e.g., Bali, Indonesia), star rating, and price.

layers.name: special_offers_section
layers.description: The 'Special Offers' section title with a 'Show More' button, followed by a horizontal scrollable list of offer cards, like 'Last Minute Alps Trip'.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A UI section titled 'Special Offers' with a 'Show More' button on the right. Below the title, display a horizontal scrollable list of travel offer cards, each with an image and offer details (e.g., 'Last Minute Alps Trip').

layers.name: bottom_navigation_bar
layers.description: The bottom navigation bar with five icons and labels: 'Explore', 'Bookings', 'Trips', 'Wishlist', and 'Profile', with 'Profile' highlighted.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A clean, modern bottom navigation bar for a travel app. It should contain five icons and labels: 'Explore', 'Bookings', 'Trips', 'Wishlist', and 'Profile'. The 'Profile' icon and label should be highlighted with a light purple background.
